# BP-95 negative: the response body is closed after a successful request
lang: go
file: BP-95-safe.go
variant: net-http
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func fetch() {
	req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://example.com", nil)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}
	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}
	if err := resp.Body.Close(); err != nil {
		return
	}
}
